A

a - com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity
Thermal diffusivity.

B

BTU - Static variable in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
British thermal unit acc.

C

com.hummeling.if97 - package com.hummeling.if97
Steam tables for industrial use according to the international standard for the properties of water and steam, the IAPWS-IF97 formulation and the international standards for transport and other properties.
compressibilityHS(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Isothermal compressibility as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
compressibilityPH(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Isothermal compressibility as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
compressibilityPS(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Isothermal compressibility as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
compressibilityPT(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Isothermal compressibility as a function of pressure & temperature.
compressionFactorPT(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Compression factor (real-gas factor) as a function of pressure & temperature.
convertFromDefault(IF97.UnitSystem, IF97.Quantity, double) - Static method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
 
cp - com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity
Specific isobaric heat capacity.
cv - com.hummeling.if97.IF97.Quantity
Specific isochoric heat capacity.

D

DEFAULT - com.hummeling.if97.IF97.UnitSystem

densityHS(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Density as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
densityPH(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Density as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.

Density as a function of pressure & specific entropy.

Density as a function of pressure & temperature.

Density as a function of pressure & vapour fraction.
densityTX(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Density as a function of temperature & vapour fraction.
dielectricConstantHS(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Dielectric constant as a function of specific enthalpy and specific entropy.
dielectricConstantPH(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Dielectric constant as a function of pressure and specific enthalpy.
dielectricConstantPS(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Dielectric constant as a function of pressure and specific entropy.
dielectricConstantPT(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Dielectric constant as a function of pressure and temperature.
dielectricConstantRhoT(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Dielectric constant (relative static dielectric constant or relative static permittivity) as a function of density and temperature.

Dynamic viscosity as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
dynamicViscosityPH(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97

Dynamic viscosity as a function of pressure & specific entropy.

Dynamic viscosity as a function of pressure & temperature.
dynamicViscosityRhoT(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Dynamic viscosity as a function of density & temperature.

I

IF97 - Class in com.hummeling.if97
Steam tables for industrial use according to the international standard for the properties of water and steam, the IAPWS-IF97 formulation and the international standards for transport and other properties.
IF97() - Constructor for class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Instantiate an IF97 object with the default unit system.
IF97(IF97.UnitSystem) - Constructor for class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Instantiate an IF97 object with the specified unit system.
IF97.Quantity - Enum in com.hummeling.if97
Quantities as defined by reference given above.
IF97.UnitSystem - Enum in com.hummeling.if97
See www.if97.software for available unit systems.
IMPERIAL - com.hummeling.if97.IF97.UnitSystem
British imperial unit system.

Isentropic exponent as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.

Isentropic exponent as a function of pressure & specific entropy.

isobaricCubicExpansionCoefficientPS(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97

isobaricCubicExpansionCoefficientTX(double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97

partialDerivativePH(double, double, IF97.Quantity, IF97.Quantity, IF97.Quantity) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Partial derivative of z with respect to x for constant y in SI units, as a function of pressure and specific enthalpy.
partialDerivativePT(double, double, IF97.Quantity, IF97.Quantity, IF97.Quantity) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Gets the partial derivative of z with respect to x for constant y in SI units, as a function of pressure and temperature.
partialDerivativeRhoT(double, double, IF97.Quantity, IF97.Quantity, IF97.Quantity) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Gets the partial derivative of z with respect to x for constant y in SI units, as a function of density and temperature, valid in region 3 only!
pc - Static variable in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
Critical pressure [MPa].

Pressure as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.

refractiveIndexRhoTLambda(double, double, double) - Method in class com.hummeling.if97.IF97
